Results.Title: Disappointed customer

ClientResponses.Response: Hello Anthony and thank you for the feedback you posted on the Home Depot Canada website regarding the Moen Doherty Pull Down Kitchen Faucet. We are sorry to hear that the faucet is leaking. This unit is backed by a limited lifetime warranty. Our Product Specialists are available for further technical/warranty assistance. We can be reached at 1-800-289-6636 Monday through Friday from 8:00 am – 7:00 pm Eastern Time.

Results.ReviewText: Bought this model of Moen taps thinking it would last. Bought on April 20 2026 and less than a week it's leaking out of the valve body. Now I got to replace it again for the third time. I guess quality and looks are two different things.
Results.OriginalProductName: Doherty Pull Down Kitchen Faucet/Tap in Matte Black (Deckplate Included)

Results.Title: Poor color uniformity

ClientResponses.Response: Hello RobM and thank you for the feedback you posted on the Moen website. We are pleased to see that you have contacted our Moen Plus Support Center and they ordered you a replacement spout for your Moen Doherty Kitchen Faucet. We appreciate your business and we are delighted that we were able to assist you.

Results.ReviewText: Poor quality. After installing it is noticeable that the Neck color is a different color than the Base and Head. Not the same uniform color as in advertised. Looks like the neck was processed with a different color. Wife wants it replaced, stating that we should not settle for mismatched parts.

Results.Title: Not satisfied

ClientResponses.Response: Hello Ivan and thank you for the feedback you posted on the Home Depot website. We are sorry to hear of the experience you had with your purchase of the Moen 87260BL Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Matte Black. Please contact us for further assistance. We can be reached at 800-289-6636. Our current business hours are Monday through Friday from 8:00 am - 7:00 pm (EST)

Results.ReviewText: I bought this last night. And when I got home and opened the box, there were two missing items or parts like the weight ball for the hose and rubber gasket. That is why it was on sale. Bad experienced. I will never buy a sale item again.
Results.OriginalProductName: Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Matte Black

Results.Title: Cheap & poorly designed

ClientResponses.Response: Thank you so much for the feedback you posted on the website. Moen takes consumer comments very seriously and we are delighted to have the opportunity to assist you. The Moen Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Spot Resist Stainless includes a warranty with purchase. If replacing the broken piece did not resolve your issue, please contact Moen Consumer Services at 800-289-6636. Our business hours are 8:00 am - 7:00 pm, Monday through Friday EST.

Results.ReviewText: 10 months in the little plastic collar that keeps the upright stem in place broke - It flops over at the base connection constantly and I don't see any point in fixing it with the replacement plastic, it will just break again.  I used to think Moen was a good brand, but now will only go with Kohler.
Results.OriginalProductName: Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Spot Resist Stainless

Results.ReviewText: This was a great selection for my kitchen.  It functions very well.  It's also very modern looking. The brushes nickel gives a nice modern professional look.  The installation was fast and simple. I never get tired of getting complements on how great the kitchen remodel looks.
Results.OriginalProductName: Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Spot Resist Stainless

Results.Title: Cartridge defective out of the box

ClientResponses.Response: Hello Blake and thank you for the feedback you posted on the Home Depot website regarding the Moen Doherty Single Handle Pull Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet. We are sorry to hear that the amount of water on the cold side was diminished. Our Product Specialists are available for further technical/warranty assistance. We can be reached at 1-800-289-6636 Monday through Friday from 8:00 am – 7:00 pm Eastern Time.

Results.ReviewText: Was excited to upgrade our kitchen faucet, however immediately upon installing it right out of the box, the cartridge has proven to be defective, causing cold water to come out in a trickle. I flushed the lines, pulled the faucet apart and rinsed the cartridge, but it didn’t make a difference. Disappointing and frustrating that Moen puts out such an inferior product.
Results.OriginalProductName: Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Matte Black

Results.ReviewText: I love my new Moen faucet. My brother, who is a handy plumber, had offered to install the faucet. I love it. It looks great in my kitchen and it was just the update that I needed.
Results.OriginalProductName: Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Spot Resist Stainless

Results.ReviewText: Easy to install. Seems to be well made. Easy to set water temperature and volume. Can turn on with clean part of hand or wrist keeping the lever clean.
Results.OriginalProductName: Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Matte Black

Results.ReviewText:
Nice faucet but issues registering for warranty on Moen's website.
Seems this model in discontinued (date of Mfg inside box says June 2023), and HomeDepot is selling discontinued fixtures at full price.
Results.OriginalProductName: Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Spot Resist Stainless

Results.ReviewText: My previous faucet started leaking so I had to purchase a new one quickly and it had to be in stock. I am giving this a 4 star because it leaks a few drops of water after it is turned off each time. It looks good but does feel a little cheap. Very light weight. The best part was it is extremely easy to install as it has the water lines hooked on it already and they are long enough to reach from the faucet to the cut off valves. Much easier than the faucet that failed. It comes with a tool to screw it to the counter top which was a plus. I have contacted Moen about the drip and they are sending a replacement part that should correct this problem.
Results.OriginalProductName: Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Spot Resist Stainless

Answer.AnswerText: Hello Albert and thank you for your interest in Moen products.  The Moen Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Matte Black faucet base is 3-9/16” in diameter. If you have additional questions, please feel free to call us at 1-800-289-6636.  Our business hours are 8:00 a.m.-7:00 p.m. Eastern Time Monday through Friday.

Hello John and thank you for your interest in Moen products.  The Moen 160657 cartridge will need to be replaced to resolve the issue with a handle leak from the Moen Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Spot Resist Stainless. If you have additional questions, please feel free to call us at 1-800-289-6636.  Our business hours are 8:00 a.m.-7:00 p.m. Eastern Time Monday through Friday.

Hello Patrick and thank you for your interest in Moen products. The Moen 87260BL Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Matte Black requires a  1-1/2” minimum diameter hole. Should you have additional questions, please feel free to call us at 800-289-6636. We are available Monday through Friday from 8:00 am - 7:00 pm (EST).

Hello Lisa and thank you for your interest in Moen products.  The Moen Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Spot Resist Stainless has a spout reach of 7-7/8” from the center base of the spout out into the sink. If you have additional questions, please feel free to call us at 1-800-289-6636.  Our business hours are 8:00 a.m.-7:00 p.m. Eastern Time Monday through Friday.

Hello Shakira and thank you for your interest in Moen products. The Moen 87260SRS Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Spot Resist Stainless supply lines have 3/8” CC fittings. Should you have additional questions, please feel free to call us at 800-289-6636. We are available Monday through Friday from 8:00 am - 7:00 pm (EST).

Hello Cody and thank you for your interest in Moen products. The installation cost for the Moen Doherty Single Handle Pull Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet will vary from each installer. If you have additional questions, please feel free to call us at 800-289-6636.  Our current business hours are Monday through Friday from 8:00 am - 7:00 pm (Eastern Time).

Hello VCAG, thank you for your interest in Moen products. The Moen Doherty Single Handle Pull Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet does include the faucet, mounting hardware and flexible supply lines with 3/8” CC fittings which should connect directly to supply stop. If you have additional questions, please feel free to call us at 800-289-6636.  Our current business hours are Monday through Friday from 8:00 am - 7:00 pm (Eastern Time).

Hello Albert and thank you for your interest in the Moen 87260BL Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Matte Black.  The 3-hole escutcheon/deck plate included with the Moen 87260BL Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Matte Black is 10-1/4” long and 2-3/8” wide.  If the Moen 87260BL Doherty Single Handle Pull-Down Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Matte Black is installed without the 3-hole escutcheon/deck plate, the base of the faucet has a 2.315” diameter.  If you have any additional questions, Moen product specialists can be reached at 1-800-289-6636 and are available Monday through Friday from 8:00 am – 7:00 pm Eastern Time.

Results.QuestionSummary: My countertop is 24 inches wide. The sink I'm planning to buy is 19 inches. Does the faucet fit on the countertop? The sink has no holes.
What is the size of the faucet base?

There is a NEW faucet fixture that was just put in but we do not want it. There is no other plumbing work to due regarding pipes etc, they are all new as they were taken care of. Just need this new one to be installed. How much would that cost.
How to stop a leak from the handle at the top
What size hole do I need in the countertop to install this?
does this include everything you need
What is the reach of the faucet? In other words, how far into the sink does the neck extend?
What is the size of the flex line?

richContent.salsifyRichContent:
At Moen, we are committed to ensuring every experience you have with water in your home is an exceptional one, from leveraging technology to delivering water in an innovative, more customized way, to designing on-trend products that artfully combine form and function to reflect your personal style.  

Moen Kitchen Innovations

Kitchen Faucets

Moen's broad selection of kitchen faucets offers a wide array of functionality and design. Choose from standard handle faucets or an innovation such as touchless or voice activated for hands-free convenience.  

Sinks & Garbage Disposals

From farmhouse fireclay options to classic stainless steel, Moen sinks bring a clean, elevated look to the kitchen, with superior performance to handle even the toughest tasks. Pair with one of Moen's garbage disposals that are designed to make kitchen cleanup a breeze.  

Kitchen Accessories

Add the finishing touches to your kitchen. Moen offers a full line of coordinating kitchen complements that include pot fillers, soap dispensers, air switches, water filtration and beverage faucets.  

Moen Bathroom Innovations

Bathroom Faucets

Moen offers a range of traditional two-handle faucets or modern one-handle options. From warm brushed gold to cool chrome, choose the finish you love.  

Custom Showering

Moen offers a variety of valve options, showering devices and products to help you create an indulging, spa-like tub & shower for your specific needs.  

eBidets & eToilets

Achieve personalized comfort and enhanced cleanliness with Moen's Bidet Seats, Electronic Bidet Seats and Electronic Toilet to elevate your bathroom.  

Bathroom Accessories

From robe hooks to towel bars, lighting knobs and pulls, Moen offers a wide range of coordinating accessories to complete any room.  

Moen Smart Water Network

Smart Kitchen Faucets

Experience the ultimate in precision and personalization with Moen's touchless smart faucet - able to be controlled through your voice, hands-free wave sensor, smartphone app or the handle.  

Smart Water Security

Smart Water Security products monitor your home's water to help prevent leaks and costly water damage, while also tracking your water usage to identify opportunities to conserve.  

Smart Sprinkler

Effortless outdoor watering, all from the palm of your hand. The Smart Sprinkler Controller and Smart Wireless Soil Sensors offer automated and customized outdoor watering routines.  

Smart Shower

The Moen Smart Water Shower provides precise temperature control and twelve preset options to create a shower customized to meet your exact needs, including three choices to control the shower.

details.description: A sophisticated single-handle design, the Doherty Pulldown Kitchen Faucet embodies the essence of transitional style by seamlessly blending modern glamour with classic elegance. Its soft curves and clean lines boast a refined appearance that will complement any kitchen aesthetic. Crafted with functionality in mind, Doherty includes Moen's Power Clean and Reflex technologies to deliver 50% more spray power than faucets without it while also facilitating easy undocking, continuous movement, and effortless retraction for a dynamic and efficient kitchen experience. The faucet is available in Spot Resist Stainless to maintain the brilliance of the fixture.
highlights: SPOT RESIST STAINLESS: Resists fingerprints and water spots
EASY REACH: Kitchen sink faucet has pull down sprayer
Tested beyond standards for long-lasting performance

descriptiveAttributes.name: Bullet01
descriptiveAttributes.value: Tested beyond industry standards to handle real-world wear and tear so your faucet performs like new for decades

descriptiveAttributes.name: Bullet02
descriptiveAttributes.value: Easy to install: features duralock quick connect system for easy installation

descriptiveAttributes.name: Bullet03
descriptiveAttributes.value: Built to last: backed by a limited lifetime warranty

descriptiveAttributes.name: Bullet04
descriptiveAttributes.value: Spot resistant: spot resist stainless finish resists fingerprints and water spots for a cleaner looking kitchen

descriptiveAttributes.name: Bullet05
descriptiveAttributes.value: Secure docking: equipped with the reflex system for smooth operation, easy movement and secure docking of the pulldown/pullout spray head

descriptiveAttributes.name: Bullet06
descriptiveAttributes.value: OPTIONAL: deck plate included - compatible with 1 or 3 hole installation

descriptiveAttributes.name: Bullet07
descriptiveAttributes.value: ADA compliant: complies with Americans with disabilities act (ADA) specifications

descriptiveAttributes.name: Bullet22
descriptiveAttributes.value: Every drop, certified safe: every Moen residential kitchen and bath faucet complies with the Federal Safe Drinking Water Act and NSF 61 standards - making Moen the safe choice for clean drinking water

seo.seoDescription: Add a subtle look to your kitchen sink with this MOEN Doherty Single Handle PullDown Sprayer Kitchen Faucet with Power Clean and Reflex in Spot Resist Stainless
